data.title: Sprott Active Gold & Silver Miners ETF hits $100M in assets, the only active ETF in this niche gaining rapidly.
data.description: An actively managed ETF concentrating on gold and silver mining companies has experienced a significant surge in assets recently. This is the only ETF of its kind and has attracted a substantial increase in funds under management. The ETF's unique focus on gold and silver miners has propelled its growth, with a noticeable uptick in assets under management.

data.title: Magaya Corporation ends Q3 2025 with strong revenue growth, CEO Gary Nemmers states freight industry is evolving.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, Magaya Corporation, a top freight management platform for logistics service providers, revealed a successful finish to the third quarter with revenue growth aligning with expectations. CEO Gary Nemmers commented on the shifting landscape of the freight industry in 2025, emphasizing the significant changes occurring. The company's strong performance indicates growth and stability in the evolving market.

data.title: Molecular Designs submits Simplicity™Dx Respiratory Panel for FDA 510(k) clearance on Oct 2, 2025.
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama on October 2, 2025, Molecular Designs disclosed that they have filed a 510(k) premarket notification with the FDA for their Simplicity™Dx Respiratory Panel. The company specializes in crafting molecular infectious disease assays.

data.title: Fluor Corporation (NYSE: FLR) to discuss Q3 results on November 7th, 2025 at 8:30 am Eastern with CEO and CFO. Live webcast available.
data.description: Fluor Corporation (NYSE: FLR), headquartered in Irving, Texas, is scheduled to discuss its third-quarter performance for the period ending September 30, 2025. Interested parties are welcome to join the conference call on Friday, November 7, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. CEO, Jim Breuer, and CFO, John Regan, will lead the call. The company's financial results will be disclosed before the market opens on the same day. A live webcast, along with presentation slides, will be accessible online.

data.title: Cronos (CRO) ties up with Morpho & Crypto.com to boost DeFi lending, introducing innovative features & expanding tokenization opportunities worldwide.
data.description: Cronos (CRO) has formed a strategic partnership with Morpho and Crypto.com to improve DeFi lending on its platform. This collaboration aims to introduce innovative borrowing functionalities and broaden tokenization prospects on a worldwide scale. This will have a significant impact on the DeFi sector and enhance opportunities for users, with the potential for substantial growth in the global DeFi lending market.

data.title: OpenAI's valuation of $500B surpasses SpaceX. Tether is the closest rival in crypto with the same valuation, leaving Coinbase, Ripple, and Circle behind.
data.description: Tether, a cryptocurrency company, is leading the pack in terms of valuation compared to industry giants like Coinbase, Ripple, and Circle. Its estimated valuation is within proximity of OpenAI's impressive $500 billion valuation.
